rationale: Educ. Code §43.062 governs information technology contracts and resources for a corporation. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemptions, so no conflict arises.
quote: Chapters 2054 and 2055, Government Code, do not apply to the corporation or to any state agency with respect to a contract entered into between the agency and the corporation for information technology or associated resources.
_note: Rule text concerns IT procurement for a corporation; wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
